overall.description: First-person night hiking footage along a narrow dirt trail through rocky terrain. The path is illuminated by a headlamp or flashlight, revealing grass and wildflowers along the sides under a dark starry sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a headlamp or flashlight

entered.detail: steep rocky slope rising on the left side of the trail
narrow unpaved path with loose rocks and dirt
tall grass and low vegetation lining the right side of the path
dark night sky with visible stars overhead
cluster of orange wildflowers visible on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by an artificial light source. A rocky hillside rises on the left while grass and occasional wildflowers line the right side, all under a dark starry sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail, having passed the wildflower cluster and proceeding deeper into the terrain

segments.scene_description: The hike continues along the same narrow trail, having passed the orange wildflowers. The rocky hillside remains on the left and the grassy terrain on the right, with the path illuminated ahead under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a narrow dirt trail at night, maintaining a steady progression through a rugged wilderness under a starry sky. It begins with the camera advancing under the glow of an artificial light source, flanked by a rising rocky hillside on the left and patches of grass and wildflowers on the right. As the camera pushes forward, the path carries the viewer past clusters of orange wildflowers that gradually recede from view. The scene then persists along the same constrained trail, where the stark contrast between the stony slope and the grassy terrain remains constant. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the darkness, with the beam of light steadily illuminating the dirt path ahead.
